title_zh: Gemini Omni 与 Gemini 3.5 的9个演示实况
title_en: 9 Demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in Action
summary_zh: 观看9个视频，展示了在2026年Google I/O大会上发布的Gemini Omni和Gemini 3.5的强大功能。
summary_en: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过这些演示视频，用户可以直观了解Gemini Omni和Gemini 3.5的新特性及其在实际应用中的表现，帮助开发者和爱好者更好地掌握这些AI工具。

title_en: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
summary_zh: JetBrains发布了名为Mellum2的12亿参数混合专家模型，旨在提升AI模型的效率和性能。
summary_en: JetBrains has released Mellum2, a 12 billion parameter mixture-of-experts model designed to enhance AI model efficiency and performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 专家混合模型通过动态调用不同专家子模型，能更有效地利用计算资源，从而提升模型推理速度和准确度。
why_it_matters_en: Mixture-of-experts models dynamically activate different expert subnetworks, enabling more efficient use of computational resources and improving inference speed and accuracy.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 超越大型语言模型：可扩展企业AI采用依赖智能代理逻辑
title_en: Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic
summary_zh: 本文探讨了企业在大规模采用人工智能时，为什么仅依赖大型语言模型（LLMs）不足，智能代理逻辑成为关键因素。
summary_en: The article discusses why relying solely on large language models (LLMs) is insufficient for scalable enterprise AI adoption, emphasizing the critical role of agent logic.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着企业对AI需求的增加，仅有LLM无法实现复杂任务自动化，智能代理逻辑使AI系统更灵活、高效地整合多种能力，满足企业实际需求。
why_it_matters_en: As enterprises demand more from AI, LLMs alone cannot automate complex tasks; agent logic enables AI systems to be more flexible and efficient by integrating multiple capabilities to meet real-world enterprise needs.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic. Category: business_investment. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 欢迎NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理AI推理和行动的开放全模组
title_en: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
summary_zh: NVIDIA发布了Cosmos 3，这是首个开放的全模组，专为物理AI推理和行动设计，推动了人工智能在物理世界中的理解与应用。
summary_en: NVIDIA has released Cosmos 3, the first open omni-model designed for physical AI reasoning and action, advancing artificial intelligence's understanding and application in the physical world.
why_it_matters_zh: 这款模型的发布标志着物理AI领域的一大进展，为开发更加智能和自主的AI系统提供了基础。
why_it_matters_en: The release of this model marks a significant advancement in physical AI, providing a foundation for developing more intelligent and autonomous AI systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PhyDrawGen：从自然语言生成基于物理的图示
title_en: PhyDrawGen: Physically Grounded Diagram Generation from Natural Language
summary_zh: PhyDrawGen提出了一种神经符号方法，从文本中生成符合物理规律的力学、光学和电磁学图示。该方法首先用大语言模型提取场景图，再通过确定性求解器转换为平面图编码物理约束，最后借助微调的Qwen-VL模型在视觉层面进行约束验证和修正。经1449个问题测试，PhyDrawGen在物理精度上显著优于GPT-5-image和Gemini系列。
summary_en: PhyDrawGen introduces a neuro-symbolic pipeline that generates physics diagrams from natural language while strictly adhering to physical laws. It extracts a typed scene graph with a large language model, converts it into a Planar Straight-Line Graph encoding physical constraints, and uses a fine-tuned Qwen-VL model for iterative visual verification and correction. Tested on 1,449 problems across mechanics, optics, and electromagnetism, it outperforms GPT-5-image and Gemini models in physical accuracy, including on atypical object problems.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统模型生成的图示往往存在力向量幻觉、忽略守恒定律和违反几何约束等问题，PhyDrawGen有效解决了这些挑战，实现了物理约束下的高精度图像生成，推动了物理问题自动可视化技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: Existing models often hallucinate force vectors, ignore conservation laws, and violate geometric constraints in generated diagrams. PhyDrawGen addresses these issues by integrating symbolic reasoning with visual verification, enabling high-fidelity, physically grounded diagram generation that advances automated visualization for physics problems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: PhyDrawGen: Physically Grounded Diagram Generation from Natural Language. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 物理可行的世界模型：为查询条件化具身AI提供理由
title_en: Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI
summary_zh: 具身人工智能的世界模型必须具备物理可行性，即通过表示影响行为结果的物理结构来回答干预查询，而不仅仅是预测未来观测。现有以观测预测为导向的世界模型虽然能生成视觉上合理的结果，却常常在物理上错误，因不同物理系统在干预下可能表现不同但视觉相同。作者通过控制基准测试揭示该问题，强调应构建包含环境表示、潜状态及参数估计、行为规范、干预动力学和查询响应等模块的模型，以最简物理抽象回答干预查询。该方法使模型可解释、组件可验证、输出可审计，并为规划、控制和验证提供设计原则和可行性测试。
summary_en: World models for embodied AI must be physically viable, meaning they represent the physical structure governing action outcomes to answer intervention queries rather than merely predicting future observations. Existing observation-predictive models may produce visually plausible but physically incorrect rollouts because different physical systems can appear identical yet behave differently under interventions. This paper exposes the problem via controlled benchmarks and proposes models composed of modular components—environment representation, latent state and parameter estimation, action specification, interventional dynamics, and query-level response—that provide the simplest physical abstraction sufficient to answer queries. This approach enhances interpretability, verifiability, and auditability, serving as a design principle and feasibility test for new and existing models, demonstrated on queries where prior systems fail, and supports dynamic assembly for planning, control, and verification.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究指出现有世界模型缺乏物理正确性，导致错误行为推荐和不安全行为认证。通过提出查询条件化的模块化物理世界模型，不仅提升了模型的准确性和可验证性，也为具身AI系统的规划和控制提供了更可靠的基础。
why_it_matters_en: This work highlights that current world models often lack physical correctness, resulting in infeasible action recommendations and unsafe behavior certification. By proposing query-conditioned, modular physical world models, it improves accuracy and verifiability, providing a more reliable foundation for planning and control in embodied AI systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 将分解任务转换与编码为SAT求解：哪些有益，哪些有害（扩展版）
title_en: Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version)
summary_zh: 本文研究了将分解任务（FTS）编码为SAT问题的方法，提出了多种将分解的转换关系翻译成命题逻辑的策略，并分析了在该场景中如何利用不同层次的并行性及常见任务转换对基于SAT规划器性能的影响。
summary_en: This work investigates encoding factored tasks (FTS) into SAT, proposes several strategies for translating factored transition relations into propositional logic, and analyzes how to exploit parallelism at various levels and the impact of common task transformations on the performance of SAT-based planners.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究拓展了传统规划技术，将分解任务与SAT求解结合，助力构建更高效的规划器，推动了规划与形式化方法的交叉创新。
why_it_matters_en: The research enhances traditional planning by integrating factored tasks with SAT solving, facilitating more efficient planners and advancing cross-disciplinary innovations between planning and formal methods.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version). Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 可配置奖励模型以实现平衡的安全对齐
title_en: Configurable Reward Model for Balanced Safety Alignment
summary_zh: 本文提出了可配置安全奖励模型（CSRM），通过目标数据增强方法，使模型对细粒度安全配置和对话细节更敏感，大幅提升了对新安全配置的泛化能力。CSRM在CoSApien和DynaBench等可配置安全基准测试中达到最新最好表现，无需额外人工标注。下游安全对齐实验显示，CSRM显著提升了大语言模型的帮助性与安全性权衡。
summary_en: This paper introduces the Configurable Safety Reward Model (CSRM), which uses configuration-targeted data augmentation to enhance sensitivity to fine-grained safety configurations and conversational nuances, substantially improving generalization to unseen safety setups. CSRM achieves state-of-the-art results on benchmarks like CoSApien and DynaBench without extra human annotation. Downstream safety alignment with CSRM yields large language models with much better helpfulness-safety tradeoffs.
why_it_matters_zh: 当前大语言模型难以适应多样化且快速变化的安全需求，CSRM通过可配置奖励模型和数据增强技术解决了这一难题，实现更可靠和灵活的安全对齐。
why_it_matters_en: Large language models struggle to meet diverse and evolving safety demands. CSRM addresses this by providing configurable reward modeling and targeted data augmentation, enabling more reliable and flexible safety alignment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Configurable Reward Model for Balanced Safety Alignment. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: CanLegalRAGBench：评估加拿大案例法中的检索增强生成技术
title_en: CanLegalRAGBench: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation on Canadian Case Law
summary_zh: RAG技术在法律助理中越来越受欢迎，但大型语言模型的幻觉问题仍可能影响司法公正。现有评测多依赖合成查询，且对加拿大法律的覆盖不足。为此，本文提出CanLegalRAGBench，一个基于真实查询和案例法专家标注答案的加拿大法律问答基准。评测显示，检索性能受设计影响显著，开源嵌入模型与闭源模型表现相当，但自动评测存在惩罚检索到其他相关文档的局限。生成答案常偏离标准答案，存在幻觉或内容过多偏题，8-29%的断言缺乏文档支持。该基准旨在推动法律RAG系统的持续改进。
summary_en: RAG-based legal assistants are increasingly popular, yet hallucinations in large language models pose risks to justice. Existing benchmarks often rely on synthetic queries and underrepresent Canadian law. To address this, CanLegalRAGBench is introduced—a Canadian legal QA benchmark based on realistic queries and expert-annotated case law answers. Evaluation reveals retrieval performance is sensitive to design choices; open-source embedding models compete with closed-source ones. Automatic evaluations have limitations, penalizing retrieval of alternative relevant documents. Generated answers frequently diverge from gold standards due to hallucinations or excessive irrelevant details; 8-29% of claims lack support from documents. This benchmark aims to drive progress in overcoming legal RAG system limitations.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究填补了加拿大法律信息检索与生成评测的空白，提供了基于真实法律场景的评测工具，有助于提升法律辅助系统的可靠性与实用性。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the gap in evaluating retrieval-augmented generation systems specifically for Canadian law, using realistic legal queries and expert annotations, thereby improving the reliability and usefulness of legal AI assistants.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: CanLegalRAGBench: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation on Canadian Case Law. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 为LLM评审生成和优化动态评估量表
title_en: Generating and Refining Dynamic Evaluation Rubrics for LLM-as-a-Judge
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的训练免费方法，用于自动生成适用于特定数据集和具体实例的细粒度评估量表。在四个基准测试中，该方法的性能与现有方法相当。进一步，作者设计了基于元评审奖励信号的量表生成器迭代微调方法，微调后生成器在成对和单点评估中均超越所有现有基线。值得注意的是，一款微调后的14B量表生成器在生成量表方面超越了体量更大的专有模型，展示了微调策略的有效性。
summary_en: This paper proposes a training-free method to automatically generate fine-grained evaluation rubrics tailored to dataset-specific and instance-specific contexts without requiring human annotations. The method achieves competitive performance across four benchmarks. Moreover, the authors introduce an iterative fine-tuning approach for the rubric generator using meta-judge reward signals, leading to a fine-tuned generator that surpasses all baselines in both pairwise and pointwise evaluations. Notably, a fine-tuned 14B rubric generator outperforms a much larger proprietary model for rubric generation, demonstrating the effectiveness of the fine-tuning strategy.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破了传统依赖人工标注的量表生成限制，实现了自动且细粒度的评估量表生成，提升了LLM作为评审的效能和扩展性。微调策略带来的性能提升尤其重要，展示了通过奖励信号优化模型评审能力的新路径。
why_it_matters_en: This research overcomes the limitations of traditional rubric generation that rely on human annotations by enabling automatic and fine-grained rubric creation, enhancing the effectiveness and scalability of LLMs as judges. The performance gains from the fine-tuning strategy are particularly significant, highlighting a novel approach to improving model evaluation capabilities via reward-based optimization.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Generating and Refining Dynamic Evaluation Rubrics for LLM-as-a-Judge. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 波士顿儿童医院利用人工智能开启新诊断
title_en: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
summary_zh: 波士顿儿童医院采用OpenAI技术提升患者护理，减轻运营负担，帮助诊断超过40例罕见疾病。
summary_en: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过引入人工智能技术，医院能够更快速准确地诊断罕见疾病，提升医疗效率和患者服务质量，展现了AI在医疗领域的巨大潜力。
why_it_matters_en: By integrating AI technology, the hospital can diagnose rare diseases more quickly and accurately, improving medical efficiency and patient care, demonstrating the significant potential of AI in healthcare.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 可信赖第三方评估的共享指南
title_en: A Shared Playbook for Trustworthy Third Party Evaluations
summary_zh: OpenAI发布了关于第三方AI评估的指导原则，涵盖如何评估模型能力、安全措施以及前沿系统的有效性。
summary_en: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着AI模型日益复杂，确保第三方评估的可信度对推动技术安全发展至关重要。该指南有助于统一评估标准，保障评估结果的可靠性。
why_it_matters_en: As AI models become increasingly complex, ensuring the trustworthiness of third-party evaluations is crucial for safe technology development. This guidance helps unify evaluation standards and ensure the reliability of assessment outcomes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Shared Playbook for Trustworthy Third Party Evaluations. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 探索OpenAI的前沿治理框架，以及我们在AI安全、保障和风险管理方面如何符合欧盟和加州的新兴法规。
summary_en: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.
why_it_matters_zh: 该框架展示了OpenAI在AI安全和合规方面的承诺，确保我们的技术发展符合全球监管趋势。
why_it_matters_en: The framework demonstrates OpenAI’s commitment to AI safety and compliance, ensuring our technology development aligns with global regulatory trends.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
